_comment: Locked baseline for tests/mira_bench.py. Update when an intentional regression-or-improvement lands and is reviewed. See .github/workflows/mira-benchmark-weekly.yml and scripts/check_benchmark_regression.py.

thresholds._doc: mira_total_min: hard floor for MIRA grounded total (baseline was 282; floor is 282 - 22 ≈ 6% buffer for run-to-run LLM-judge variance). mira_advantage_min: MIRA must beat the ungrounded baseline by at least this many points (baseline advantage was 27).
